productDisplayName: Puma Men Whirlwind Classic Green Sports Shoes
description: Designed for the runner who winds past in style, the puma Whirlwind Classic comes in a low silhouette and offers unparalleled comfort.UpperNylon upper with suede and synthetic leather overlaysLacing system for a snug, customised FitPadded tongue and collar for a custom fitPadded footbed for all-day comfort and impact protectionMidsolePU midsole for lightweight comfort and shock absorptionOutsoleTPR outsole with circular lugs for absolute grip and tractionOutsole embeded onto the upper as a toe guard and heel guard
